history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: This image shows a game matchup and player scoreboard screen over a blurred outdoor scene with team names, a central “VS,” and icon-based stats.

Main Subject:
A digital scoreboard overlay displays two teams competing, with “WARBRINGERS” on the left and “HOWLERS” on the right, separated by a central “VS” label. Player rows are shown under each team with usernames, K/D/A values, damage totals, and various small rank or emblem icons, along with thumbs-up style icons on the right side of the rows.

Setting:
The background appears to be a blurred outdoor game environment, with a cloudy sky and large, stylized lettering on a wall or structure that includes a large “R” on the left side. The overall lighting looks like daytime, and the camera view is from the front toward the screen, with the scoreboard overlay centered on top of the scene.

Visual Details:
The interface uses dark, semi-transparent panels with blue shading on the left team and orange/red shading on the right team. At the very top center, the text “MENANG” is shown in large yellow lettering, with “BOOYAH!” beneath it in smaller white text. A “VS” appears in the middle, with blue on the left half and orange on the right half. The layout includes a header row for each team, then multiple horizontal player entries. Along the bottom area, there are UI elements including a small rectangular section with an icon and the text “STREAK KNOCKDOWN x 3” and a play button. On the bottom right, a large grey button-like label reads “LOBBY.” On the top left, there are two lines of text, “CLASH SQUAD” and “BERMUDA.” On the top right, there are small white icons including what looks like a headset or speaker symbol, a profile/gear-like symbol, and warning-style icons.

Visible Text:
CLASH SQUAD
BERMUDA
MENANG
BOOYAH !
WARBRINGERS
VS
HOWLERS
Nama
K/D/A
DMG
STREAK KNOCKDOWN x 3
LOBBY
No other important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a video game results or match summary screen showing two teams, Warbringers versus Howlers, with player stats in a side-by-side scoreboard. A victory-style banner with “MENANG” and “BOOYAH!” is displayed over a blurred outdoor background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

# Notes
- Some player-name text is unclear due to stylized characters; extracted as closely as possible (e.g., **VOID  i? ERAA!**, **[CalzZ'K] anti-KROON**, **LIPZZ{pino]**, **jeszhighiei GENOVAL EAGACY**). If you want, upload a higher-resolution screenshot for more accurate names.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
